name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service with 20+ locations across Denver offering fund transfers, bill payments, and cash services through partner retailers like Walmart and Ace Cash Express.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of agent locations rather than standalone branches. The company facilitates domestic and international money transfers, allowing customers to send and receive funds conveniently across multiple touchpoints in the Denver area. MoneyGram's service model relies on partnerships with retail and financial institutions to provide accessibility to consumers.

MoneyGram's primary services include money transfers, fund receiving, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options. The company operates through 20 identified Denver-area locations, including partnerships with major retailers (Walmart), check-cashing specialists (Ace Cash Express), grocery stores (Super Carniceria Compare), and convenience marts (Villa Park Mini Mart, El Patron). Customers can initiate transfers online or visit physical locations, with extended hours at many partner locations (typically 8 PM to midnight closings).

MoneyGram distinguishes itself through its expansive agent network, making services accessible beyond traditional banking hours and in diverse neighborhoods across Denver. The integration with major retailers like Walmart provides convenience and foot traffic synergies. The company's online platform allows customers to manage transfers remotely before completing them in-person, combining digital convenience with in-person verification for security.

MoneyGram's model depends entirely on third-party agent locations, meaning service quality and availability vary by partner. No independent MoneyGram-branded locations appear in the Denver network, which could limit brand consistency. Transaction fees and foreign exchange margins typical of money transfer services may not be competitive compared to digital-only alternatives. The reliance on partner hours means some locations close relatively early (8-9 PM), which may inconvenience working consumers.
pros: 20+ convenient locations across Denver including Walmart stores with extended hours (some until midnight)
Partnership network includes diverse retailers reaching multiple neighborhoods (Federal Boulevard, Parker Road, Quincy Ave locations)
Online and offline money transfer options allowing customers to initiate transfers digitally
Extended operating hours at major retail partners (Walmart locations open until 11:59 PM)
Established brand with international money transfer capabilities
Multiple service types (transfers, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) at single locations
Accessibility in underserved areas through ethnic grocery and convenience store partnerships
cons: Entirely dependent on third-party agent locations with no MoneyGram-branded standalone stores, limiting brand consistency and service control
Many partner locations close by 8-9 PM, excluding evening access for working consumers
Money transfer services typically charge higher fees than digital-only competitors like Wise or PayPal
Foreign exchange rates at MoneyGram locations are generally less favorable than online-only platforms
Service quality and availability inconsistent across different agent partners
best_for: Consumers sending money internationally who prefer in-person service and verification
Unbanked or underbanked Denver residents using retail and convenience store access points
Customers who need to pay bills or purchase money orders without a bank account
People sending domestic transfers who want extended retail hours (Walmart locations)
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need in-person money transfer services with flexible hours and don't have traditional bank access. The primary caveat is that fees and exchange rates are significantly higher than digital alternatives; tech-savvy users with bank accounts should compare MoneyGram costs against Wise, PayPal, or similar platforms before committing to a transfer.
services: Multi-language support (evidenced by Spanish-language partner locations)
Extended hours service through Walmart locations
